summary: The diff shows PreOrderForm.tsx was modified to update the Desi Mango 10 kg box price to ₹350. The pricing table, total price calculation, and WhatsApp message builder all reflect ₹350 for Desi Mango 10 kg box. Desi Mango 5 kg box remains ₹200, Kesar Mango pricing is unchanged. All acceptance criteria for REQ-37 appear to be satisfied.
